insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FILE_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE ( FILE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, TYPE_ID, DOWN_COUNT, FILE_EXT, FOLDER_ID, USE_STATUS, CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( #fileId#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #fileSize#, #typeId#, #downloadCnt#, #fileExt#, #folderId#, #useStatus#, #createId#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #createDate#, #updateId#, #updateDate#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_ID = #fileId#, FILE_NAME = #fileName#, FILE_PATH = #filePath#, FILE_SIZE = #fileSize#, TYPE_ID = #typeId#, DOWN_COUNT = #downloadCnt#, FILE_EXT = #fileExt#, FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, USE_STATUS = #useStatus#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, CREATE_DATE = #createDate#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateDate#, TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(FILE_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = 'C' AND FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CONVERT(LOG_ID, UNSIGNED INTEGER)),-1) as maxno FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = #extension# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT f.FILE_ID AS FILE_ID, f.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, f.FILE_PATH AS FILE_PATH, f.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, f.TYPE_ID AS TYPE_ID, f.DOWN_COUNT AS DOWN_COUNT, f.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, f.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, f.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, f.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, f.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, f.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(f.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(f.UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, t.TYPE_ID AS FILETYPE_ID, t.TYPE_NAME AS FILETYPE_NAME, t.TYPE_ICON AS FILETYPE_ICON, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON f.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND f.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID WHERE f.FILE_ID = #fileId# AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2 AS FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE AS FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP AS FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER AS FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID AS OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, DATE_ADD(CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID, DATE_ADD(UPDATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT a.cn as cn, a.displayname as displayName1, a.displayname2 as displayName2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER a JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER u ON a.CN = u.USER_ID AND a.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID WHERE u.USER_TYPE = "user" AND CN NOT IN (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE) AND u.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT a.cn as cn, a.displayname as displayName1, a.displayname2 as displayName2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER a JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER u ON a.CN = u.USER_ID AND a.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID WHERE u.USER_TYPE = "dept" AND u.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN FOLDER_NAME1 ELSE FOLDER_NAME2 END AS FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_LEVEL AS FOLDER_LEVEL FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUpper# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET USE_STATUS = "N" WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FILE_NAME = #name# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET FOLDER_ID = #folderId# WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE SET DOWN_COUNT = DOWN_COUNT + 1 WHERE FILE_ID = #fileId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
